pr.title: mn: match mnitemsw, mnstagesw, and mnvibration functions
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: Draft/WIP PR adding matched or improved menu settings functions for mnitemsw, mnstagesw, and mnvibration, plus headers and local structs/prototypes. Bot report claimed 7 new 100% matches and 3 improved unmatched functions, but the PR was closed unmerged and review comments flagged WIP cleanup concerns around a GObj wrapper and apparent deletion/replacement of an existing function.

key_files.role: Adds implementations for mnItemSw_80233A98, mnItemSw_8023405C, and mnItemSw_802358C0, including item-switch table lookup, node traversal, and menu transition/proc creation logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnitemsw.c hunk adds mnItemSw_80233A98, mnItemSw_8023405C, mnItemSw_802358C0
text_corpus: bot report lists mnItemSw_80233A98 and mnItemSw_8023405C as 100% matches and mnItemSw_802358C0 as 92.10%

key_files.role: Adds header guard, ItemSwTable type, prototypes, and extern declarations for item-switch data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnitemsw.h adds ItemSwTable, mnItemSw prototypes, mnItemSw_803ED340, mnItemSw_804D6BEC

key_files.role: Adds implementations for mnStageSw_8023593C, mnStageSw_802364A0, and mnStageSw_80237410, including stage settings loop, node traversal, and menu transition/proc creation logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnstagesw.c hunk adds mnStageSw_8023593C, mnStageSw_802364A0, mnStageSw_80237410
text_corpus: bot report lists all three mnstagesw functions as 100% matches

key_files.role: Adds header guard, prototypes, and extern declarations for stage-switch data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnstagesw.h adds mnStageSw prototypes and externs mnStageSw_803ED4C4, mnStageSw_804D6BF4

key_files.role: Modifies vibration menu implementation: adds mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80248084, fn_80248748, retains/reworks mnVibration_80249174, and changes includes/proc flag handling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.c hunk adds mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80248084, fn_80248748, and edits mnVibration_80249174
text_corpus: bot report lists mnVibration_802474C4 and fn_80248084 as 100% matches and fn_80248748/mnVibration_80249174 as improvements
review_comments.md: reviewer questioned GObj wrapper and deletion of an entire function

key_files.role: Adds VibNode/VibNodeContainer/VibData/VibJObjData structs, concrete prototypes for matched vibration helpers, and extern declarations for vibration data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.h replaces some UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with typed signatures and adds vibration structs/externs

what_changed.text: Added three mnitemsw functions and a new mnitemsw header with ItemSwTable, prototypes, and externs.
Added three mnstagesw functions and a new mnstagesw header with prototypes and externs.
Added or improved multiple mnvibration functions and header declarations; mnVibration_80249174 was reworked rather than only appended.
Bot report claimed +948 matched bytes, 7 new 100% matches, and 3 improved unmatched functions.
PR was explicitly WIP/draft and later closed with merged_at null.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: Still a WIP, will mark ready once I've cleaned it up
metadata_json: state CLOSED, merged_at null, draft true

smart_moves.text: Header updates accompanied recovered bodies for several functions, replacing some UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete prototypes in mnvibration.h and adding new mnitemsw/mnstagesw headers.
Repeated linked-node traversal was expressed as loops in mnItemSw_8023405C, mnStageSw_802364A0, and mnVibration_802474C4 rather than as copied repeated blocks.
Raw byte manipulation of a GObj-created object's flags was replaced in mnVibration_80249174 with the HSD_GObjProc return value and proc->flags_3 assignment.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu node accessors that select a head pointer and then walk x8 links by index, compact for-loops can match and are preferable to unrolled traversal when verifier output supports them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnItemSw_8023405C uses for loops over ItemSwNode->x8
raw_diff: mnStageSw_802364A0 uses for loops over StageSw_Node->x8
raw_diff: mnVibration_802474C4 uses for loop over VibNode->x8
text_corpus: bot report lists these traversal functions as 100% matches where applicable

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering functions, update headers with concrete signatures and necessary forward includes only where the PR evidence proves the body/signature surface.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.h changes mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80248084, fn_80248748 prototypes
raw_diff: mnitemsw.h and mnstagesw.h add prototypes for new bodies

decomp_lessons.lesson: Avoid treating a draft PR's matching report as final review acceptance; review comments and author WIP notes can make otherwise useful matching tactics unsuitable for promotion.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: author says will clean this stuff up

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names remained for unresolved functions and globals, such as fn_80233E10, fn_80235F80, fn_80247510, mnItemSw_803ED340, mnStageSw_803ED4C4, and mnVibration_804D6C28.
Local recovered structs used subsystem-specific prefixes plus offset-style fields where semantics were not proven, e.g. ItemSwNode x8/x10, StageSw_Node x8/x10, VibNode x8/x10, and VibData x2C.

The reviewer questioned a proposed wrapper type for GObj access, indicating that wrapper names like VibGObj/StageSw_GObj need stronger type evidence when an existing HSD_GObj type can be used directly.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: Why are we making a wrapper type for a GObj instead of using it directly?

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used explicit dummy stack storage in mnStageSw_8023593C: s32 dummy[3]; (void) dummy;
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: No narrow rationale is given beyond the bot match report; this falls under the standard requiring explicit evidence for stack-shape tactics.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used function-pointer casts to call mnVibration_80248ED4 and fn_80247510 while related prototypes remained unknown or mismatched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.h leaves fn_80247510 and mnVibration_80248ED4 as UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Useful as a bridge tactic, but should be revisited when the callee signatures are recovered.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Replaced direct GObj byte flag manipulation with assigning proc->flags_3 from HSD_GObj_804D783C after HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54.
Used switch cases in mnItemSw_80233A98 to special-case non-Japanese language behavior for indices 0x11 and 0x13.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.comment: Why are we making a wrapper type for a GObj instead of using it directly?
review_feedback.intake_note: Treat as a review concern against speculative wrapper structs over known engine types, not as proof of final required code.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.comment: Very confused why an entire function was deleted?
review_feedback.intake_note: Reviewer flagged that the large mnvibration.c rewrite made function removal/replacement unclear.

review_feedback.author: itsgrimetime
review_feedback.comment: I shoulda called out that this one is still a WIP - will clean this stuff up
review_feedback.intake_note: Author acknowledged WIP cleanup was still needed.

follow_up_queries: PR 2077 GObj wrapper VibGObj review PsiLupan

notes: Diff, changed-file metadata, and bot report provide strong evidence for what code was attempted and the claimed match/improvement numbers.
PR was draft/WIP and closed with merged_at null, so intake should not treat the changes as accepted final project style.

Review feedback specifically challenges parts of mnvibration.c; lessons involving wrapper types, function deletion, and stack/prototype tactics should be treated as cautions or curator candidates, not settled standards.
No local build logs beyond the bot report excerpt are included; no separate objdiff command output or final resolved review state is available.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Menu node traversal accessors can match as simple indexed linked-list walks
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2077, mnItemSw_8023405C, mnStageSw_802364A0, and mnVibration_802474C4 all recover a node by selecting a starting node pointer and walking x8 links in a for-loop. Bot report lists mnItemSw_8023405C, mnStageSw_802364A0, and mnVibration_802474C4 as 100% matches.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Draft matching PRs can contain useful match evidence without accepted style evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2077 had a bot report with new matches and improvements, but the author described it as WIP, the PR was draft/closed unmerged, and review comments flagged cleanup concerns. Use its matched functions as search evidence, not as proof that every tactic was review-accepted.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: draft true and merged_at null

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer existing engine object types over wrapper structs when accessing known HSD_GObj fields
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer questioned creating a wrapper type for a GObj instead of using HSD_GObj directly in mnvibration.c. Consider adding guidance that wrapper structs over known engine objects need stronger evidence and should not hide available typed fields.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is source-standard adjacent, but evidence is a single reviewer question on a WIP PR, so curator review is needed before promoting it.

source_update_candidates.title: Call out apparent function deletion/replacement in WIP decomp diffs
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer confusion over an entire function being deleted in mnvibration.c suggests that large decomp rewrites should clearly preserve or explain replaced functions, especially in draft PRs.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: author says WIP cleanup remains
source_update_candidates.reason: Could become review-process guidance, but the PR evidence does not prove final reviewer intent or an accepted repository-wide rule.

source_update_candidates.title: mnitemsw/mnstagesw/mnvibration are menu settings translation units with node traversal helpers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2077 changed src/melee/mn/mnitemsw.c, mnstagesw.c, and mnvibration.c to recover menu settings functions including linked-node traversal helpers and menu transition/proc setup functions.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path classification candidate, but should be validated against current source before adding as a durable path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote VibGObj or StageSw_GObj wrapper style as accepted; reviewer explicitly questioned the GObj wrapper and PR was WIP.
Do not promote dummy stack arrays or function-pointer casts as normal style from this PR alone; the evidence shows use, not final acceptance.
Do not claim the PR was merged or accepted; metadata says merged_at null and state CLOSED.
Do not treat all bot-reported improvements as completed matches: fn_80248748, mnVibration_80249174, and mnItemSw_802358C0 were reported as improved but not 100% matched.
